generators.label: Auto-block
generators.postNote: Auto-blocking builds a block from page content (no authoring). Call this from buildAutoBlocks(main) in scripts/scripts.js.

generators.label: Commerce drop-in block
generators.postNote: Bridges EDS ↔ Commerce SaaS: this block mounts a @dropins/${dropin} component. The aem-boilerplate-commerce postinstall provides the drop-in packages; see its docs for the exact container import.

generators.label: EDS Block

files.content:
# ${blockName}

EDS block. Author it by creating a table whose first cell names the block (`${blockName}`).

| ${blockName} |
| ------------ |
| content      |

- `${blockName}.js` — `decorate(block)` default export, runs at render.
- `${blockName}.css` — styles scoped to `.${blockName}`.

generators.postNote: Add the block to a document by naming a table after it. The decorate() default export receives the block element.

generators.label: EDS plugin
generators.postNote: Load the plugin from scripts/scripts.js (e.g. via the plugin loader / loadPlugin) at the lazy or eager phase as appropriate.
